%-----------SUMMARY-------------------------------------------------------------
\section{Summary}
Operations and Data Science professional with 3+ years across AI/ML product development, LLM-powered automation, full-stack web applications, and operational analytics. Currently building Gen AI-driven quality systems at Amazon's Last Mile operations --- including self-improving RAG architectures, real-time dashboards, and SLA engines. Passionate about translating complex operational problems into scalable, data-driven solutions that directly prevent customer-facing defects. Background in Mechanical Engineering with an ongoing BS in Data Science from IIT Madras.

  \resumeSubheading{Amazon}{Bengaluru, India (On-site)}{Transportation Specialist (Full-time)}{Aug 2024 - Present}
  \resumeItemListStart
    \resumeItem{Resolve-It --- LLM Powered Andon Cord}{Built an LLM-powered Andon Cord enabling auditors to raise SOP doubts from GeoStudio in one click. System performs semantic retrieval against Policy 2.0 and verified responses, generates AI suggestions for POC validation, and delivers resolutions in \textasciitilde{}5 minutes. Implements Human Feedback Reinforcement Learning --- managers approve, reject, or edit responses daily, making the system self-improving. Impact: \textasciitilde{}200 min/day recovered across 20 auditors.}
    \resumeItem{Real-Time Revert Dashboard}{Built an internal web application transforming manual quality reporting into an always-current intelligence platform. Managers upload daily revert case batches; system auto-identifies unique cases and computes role-aware KPIs on every page request --- Pre-Appeal Quality, Post-Appeal Quality, Volume Trends, and Reason Distribution. Role-based views for auditors, managers, and skip-level leaders --- eliminating ad-hoc reporting entirely.}
    \resumeItem{Slack Workflow Based Andon Cord}{Deployed a Slack-integrated anonymous doubt resolution workflow enabling auditors to raise SOP, process, and tool queries while maintaining complete anonymity. Each submission receives a unique Ticket ID, routed to managers with Answer, Assign, or Check Status options. Resolutions delivered via Slack DM and posted in team channel for organization-wide reference --- ensuring consistent understanding of dynamic procedures.}
    \resumeItem{AWS Hosted SLA Engine and Dashboard for Slack Workflow}{Engineered an SLA tracking engine monitoring ticket lifecycle metrics --- raise-to-resolution time, escalation rates, and manager approval timelines. Unresolved tickets beyond SLA are automatically escalated to leadership, ensuring zero unanswered queries. Monitoring dashboard provides leadership real-time visibility into resolution health and SLA compliance.}
    \resumeItem{Project Prophesy}{Built a proactive detection mechanism that flags repeat-defect addresses prone to escalation using multi-signal analysis, shifting defect handling from reactive to preventive.}
    \resumeItem{Project Polygon}{Reduced Shipping \& Delivery Support (SDS) expenditure by enriching the learning datasets for Global Address Management (GAM) addresses that map to multiple delivery locations.}
    \resumeItem{Project Place Based Geocoding}{Merged the GAM and Geo-Tech address systems onto a single Place-Based Geocoding (PBG) learning model, eliminating the data dispersion caused by maintaining two disparate systems.}
    \resumeItem{Data Mining}{Corrected erroneous entries and augmented incomplete learned data points in the GAM machine-learning model, improving the completeness of its training data.}
    \resumeItem{Data Sanitization}{Sanitized inputs to the GAM Flywheel pipeline so the automated Address Resolution Process (ARP) receives clean, correctly structured data.}
